---
title: "NAIF information event"
date: 2025-08-28
author: "NAIF"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "Information event introducing NAIF and its goals."
other-links:
  - text: "Related post: Launching NAIF"
    href: "../../posts/2025-08-28-naif-information-event/"
categories:
  - "Organised by NAIF"
tags:
  - "Community"
  - "Kick-off"
  - "Information session"
proofread: true
image: "images/eth-news-naif-info-event.png"
image-alt: 'ETH Zurich Staffnet news page about the NAIF information event'
image-caption: 'Screenshot of the ETH Zurich Staffnet page for the NAIF information event. Source: https://ethz.ch/staffnet/en/news-and-events/internal-news/archive/2025/08/naif-information-event-increasing-the-findability-of-swiss-research.html. Rights: ETH Zurich.'
toc: true
---


::: {.callout-note}
This event has already taken place. Any registration information has been disabled and is shown for reference only.
:::

## Details

- Date: Thursday, 28 August 2025
- Time: 16:00
- Location: Online

Registration was not available.

## Materials

- Slides (Zenodo): [Information event: NAIF](https://zenodo.org/records/18633495) ([DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18633495](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18633495))
